# Knowledge Update

GitHub Copilot adapter for [`../../../skills/knowledge-update/SKILL.md`](../../../skills/knowledge-update/SKILL.md).

## When to use

- Adding a new framework or library reference
- Refreshing existing guidance after learning or migration
- Keeping shared engineering knowledge current and reusable

## Procedure

1. Identify the target category and existing source-of-truth material.
2. Reuse the established knowledge templates and tone.
3. Update the relevant `knowledge/**/*.md` file with actionable, non-duplicated guidance.
4. Keep shared rules in shared files instead of repeating them.

## References

- [Source workflow](../../../skills/knowledge-update/SKILL.md)
- [Knowledge templates](../../../skills/knowledge-update/references/)
